final_expected_text: Tu dois ajouter axios et react-query comme dépendances dans le projet.
notes: 'axios' stays lowercase. 'react-query' keeps the hyphen — do not write 'react query' or 'ReactQuery'. Only permitted edits: capitalize 'tu' → 'Tu', add period.

raw_asr_text: la variable DATABASE_URL doit pointer vers le serveur de staging
final_expected_text: La variable DATABASE_URL doit pointer vers le serveur de staging.
notes: 'DATABASE_URL' must stay ALL_CAPS — do not normalize to 'database_url' or 'DatabaseUrl'. 'staging' stays lowercase and English (do not translate to 'pré-production'). Only: capitalize first word, add period.

final_expected_text: Vérifie que le fichier de configuration est bien dans /etc/nginx/nginx.conf.
notes: File path must survive verbatim — every slash, dot, and character. Only: capitalize 'vérifie' → 'Vérifie', add period.

final_expected_text: La méthode getUserById retourne null si l'utilisateur n'est pas trouvé dans la base.
notes: 'getUserById' must keep camelCase — do not write 'get user by id', 'get_user_by_id', or 'GetUserById'. 'null' stays lowercase (keyword). Only: capitalize first word, add period.

notes: 'Node.js' keeps the dot and exact case. 'v20.11.0' must be verbatim — do not normalize to '20.11.0' or 'version 20'. 'LTS' stays ALL_CAPS. Only: capitalize first word, add period.
